name: ac-synthetics-demo-apr26
description: Elastic Synthetics project to extract and validate TLS server certificate fingerprints (SHA-256 primary, SHA-1 optional) across multiple real-world scenarios

scripts.test:tls: npm run generate:tls-targets && elastic-synthetics journeys/tls journeys/tls-browser
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:dry && npm run check:journey-names && npm run test:unit
scripts.push: npm run generate:tls-targets && node --import tsx scripts/push-journeys.ts all
scripts.push:tls: npm run generate:tls-targets && node --import tsx scripts/push-journeys.ts tls
scripts.push:demos: npm run generate:tls-targets && node --import tsx scripts/push-journeys.ts demos
scripts.push:kibana: npm run generate:tls-targets && node --import tsx scripts/push-journeys.ts kibana
scripts.push:staging: npm run generate:tls-targets && elastic-synthetics push --config synthetics.config.ts --space staging -y
